name: Bell Financial Group Limited
summary: Bell Financial Group Limited provides stock broking, investment, and financial advisory services to private, institutional, and corporate clients. It operates through Technology & Platforms, Products & Services, Retail Broking Division, and Institutional Broking Division segments. The company provides retail broking, institutional broking, intermediary broking, online broking, equity capital markets, research, futures and foreign exchange, cash management, margin lending, and portfolio administration services. The company operates a network of 14 offices in Australia, as well as offices in New York, London, Hong Kong, and Kuala Lumpur. Bell Financial Group Limited was founded in 1970 and is based in Melbourne, Australia.
